case_title: FRANCISCO OREGEL CERVANTES VS. ANIBAL LOPEZ

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CERVANTES, FRANCISCO OREGEL AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, ANIBAL AN INDIVIDUAL DBA A.L. PAINTING JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CERVANTES, FRANCISCO OREGEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOPEZ, ANIBAL AN INDIVIDUAL DBA A.L. PAINTING $6,085.92 PRINCIPAL, $87.91 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,398.83, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
